title: Our Own
content:
They walk here with us, hand-in-hand;
     We gossip, knee-by-knee;
    They tell us all that they have planned -
     Of all their joys to be, -
    And, laughing, leave us: And, to-day,
     All desolate we cry
    Across wide waves of voiceless graves -
     Good-by! Good-by! Good-by!
meaning:
"Our Own" is a quintessential example of James Whitcomb Riley's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
